notes: L84 proves the remaining merge blocker is the staged department-pack contract layer, not the shared runtime.
Six affected packs become ready once the promoted personas inherit the final registry-backed action surface.
Marketing remains blocked by design because five external-platform personas stay planned and contract-only.
The H4S department.status taxonomy remains preserved in this package to avoid reopening downstream certification truth.
title: M365 Authoritative Persona Post-H5 Department-Pack Coverage Parity Correction v1
